manager.welcomeMessage: Welcome to your dashboard! Use the cards below to navigate.
manager.manageUsersDescription: Add, remove, or update users in the system.
manager.reviewEmployeeReportsDescription: Review and approve employee daily production reports.
manager.dailyProductionReportDescription: View daily production costs, materials used, and profit margins
manager.viewReportsDescription: Access detailed logs and reports from your team.
manager.suppliersReportDescription: View monthly purchases by supplier and compare against total income.
manager.priceIncreasesDescription: Track cost price increases detected when receiving inventory from suppliers.
manager.priceIncreaseAlert: {count} new price increase(s) require your attention.
manager.foodCostReportDescription: Estimated COGS based on completed production within a selected time period.
manager.actualFoodCostDescription: Real COGS via Opening + Purchases - Closing inventory formula for any period.
manager.foodCostDiffDescription: Compare estimated BOM consumption vs actual inventory usage to spot over/under spending.
manager.activityArchiveDescription: Browse a unified archive of logs, work sessions, reports, invoices, sales, suppliers, and accounts.

activityArchive.pageDescription: A unified timeline of persisted activity across production, finance, procurement, CRM, and system logs.
